allow: PowerShell($work = "d:\\Projects\\_akskills_work"; if \(Test-Path $work\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $work }; git clone https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills.git $work 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; if \(Test-Path $work\) { "--- cloned top-level ---"; Get-ChildItem $work -Force | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($src = "d:\\Projects\\LitaBluma"; $dst = "d:\\Projects\\_akskills_work\\litabluma"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dst | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$src\\CLAUDE.md" $dst; Copy-Item "$src\\docs" $dst -Recurse; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$dst\\.claude\\skills\\litabluma-builder" | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$src\\.claude\\skills\\litabluma-builder\\SKILL.md" "$dst\\.claude\\skills\\litabluma-builder\\"; "--- subfolder tree ---"; Get-ChildItem $dst -Recurse -Force -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\($dst, "litabluma"\) })
